Notice And Motion To Compel Answer To Post-Judgment Discovery, And For Award Of Monetary Sanctions
Off Calendar Feb-09-2011 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES:

NO APPEARANCES ON THIS MATTER. THE COURT ADOPTED ITS TENTATIVE RULING AS FOLLOWS:
PLAINTIFF CREDITORS TRADE ASSOCIATION, INCORPORATED'S Motion To Compel Answer To Post-Judgment Discovery, And For Award Of Monetary Sanctions is Granted, no opposition was filed. The court awarded $340.00 in sanctions. Moving party is to submit a proposed form of order.
Judge: Peter J. Busch, Not reported. =301/ PJB

NO APPEARANCES ON THIS MATTER. THE COURT ADOPTED ITS TENTATIVE RULING AS FOLLOWS:
PLAINTIFF CREDITORS TRADE ASSOCIATION, INC.'S Motion For Appointment Of Receiver And To Appoint Richard B. Cole As Receiver is Granted, no opposition filed. Moving party is to submit a proposed form of order. Judge: Ernest H. Goldsmith; Not reported = (310/EHG)
